zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Weare於1618年12月14日出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德時，他的父親Peter Weare35歲，母親Sarah38歲。他於1661年與Mary Puddington在美國緬因州約克約克結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年72歲，埋葬在美國緬因州約克約克約克 維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Weare于1618年12月14日出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德时，他的父亲Peter Weare35岁，母亲Sarah38岁。他于1661年与Mary Puddington在美国缅因州約克約克结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克享年72岁，埋葬在美国缅因州約克約克約克 維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: Weare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wear   or   Ware  .

variants.name: Wear
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by the Wear river in northeastern England. The river name is ancient, occuring in the form Vedra in Ptolemy's Geographia; it is probably from a Celtic word meaning ‘water’.
topographic name for someone who lived near a dam or weir, a variant of Ware 1, or a habitational name from a place called Weare, in Devon and Somerset, from Old English wær, wer ‘weir’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1652: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Weare was born on 14 December 1618, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Peter Weare, was 35 and his mother, Sarah, was 38. He married Mary Puddington in 1661, in York, York, Maine, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 January 1691, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in York Village, York, York, Maine, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Weare est né le 14 décembre 1618, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Weare, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sarah, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Mary Puddington en 1661, à York, York, Maine, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1691, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à York Village, York, York, Maine, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Weare am 14. Dezember 1618 in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Peter Weare 35 und seine Mutter Sarah 38. Er hat 1661 in York, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten Mary Puddington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Januar 1691 im Alter von 72 Jahren in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in York Village, York, York, Maine, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Weare è nato il il 14 dicembre 1618 nel Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Peter Weare, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Sarah, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Mary Puddington nel 1661, nel York, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 gennaio 1691, nel York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a York Village, York, York, Maine, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Weareが1618年12月14日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドで生まれた時，父Peter Weareは35歳，母Sarahは38歳であった。1661年にアメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークヨークでMary Puddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年1月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで72歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国メイン州ヨークヨークヨーク ヴィラッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Weare(이)가 1618년 12월 14일 영국 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Weare(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1661년 미국 메인 주 요르크 요르크에서 Mary Puddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 1월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 메인 주 요르크 요르크 요르크 비라지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Weare nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1618, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Weare, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Puddington em 1661, em York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1691, em York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em York Village, York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Weare родился 14 декабря 1618 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Weare было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Puddington в 1661 г. в местности ерк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 января 1691 г. в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк вилладж, ерк, ерк, Мэн, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Weare nació el 14 de diciembre de 1618, en Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Weare, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sarah, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Mary Puddington en 1661, en York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de enero de 1691, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en York Village, York, York, Maine, Estados Unidos.
